title: The Straw Hats Make Their Entrance
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Zoro, Unknown person #5. The core beat is the straw hats make their entrance.
scene: The scene follows the straw hats make their entrance, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Zoro, Unknown person #5.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Northern Fish-Man Island: Waterwheel Town

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GYOVALLES: Hills

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The princes are headed to the Plaza....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's going to happen to this country?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do our lives have to be placed in danger...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...just for wanting to live in peace with the humans ....?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: D'you think we can use these guys the princes captured as hostages to make them stop what they're doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I mean, they're trying to execute the king....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no use, Kotsun... Boss hordy is a cruel man, Kotsun...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you took us hostage, I'm sure he'd just abandon us and carry on, Kotsun ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, man... thanks to the damage the princes dealt to him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Dosun- San's energy levels have fallen all the way down to "Kotsun"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Rustle rustle

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quick, pass me a new energy steroid pill ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Right ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: PTTH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's always been like that, Kotsun...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Chomp

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: .He's so full of pride and ambition, Potsun...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hence, the development

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: DA-THUNP!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "Potsun" ...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He even hates any fishmen who try to do business with human pirates, posun...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: DA-THUNP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "Posun"?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if any fish-man has the nerve to offer blood donations to an injured human...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...He has them assessmented, tossun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "Tosun" ...?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: The blood of humans is tainted, tossun!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For a fish-man to exchange blood with a human is an insult to his proud fish-man heritage, dosun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's back to the old dosun- San...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: And any worthless fish-man who sees fit to side with the inferior humans is but an obstacle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...to our glorious plan, Dogan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He went beyond "Dosun" !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!!! He broke free from the chains!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where is he getting that kind of power ...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Damn you, Fukaboshi....!!! You will pay, bokan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Next time, I will crush you, Zugan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Follow me, men, bagon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We have an execution to watch at GYoncord Plaza, Gyaban !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yea aaah!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UEHAH?? Who-uh you callin' - HIC - drunk?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: you, Hyouzou- San!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Southern Fish-Man Island: Outside the Seafolk Cultural Hall

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: *_CORAL MERMAID HILL, COVE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get a hold of yourself!! You can't fight like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: C'mon, C'mon! I'll buy you a - HIC - drink, uhkaAAY?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're about to do battle with the Fukaboshi and the rest of Neptune's army!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we're unlucky, we might even have to face the legendary jimbe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no use! He's drunken than a sea cucumber!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Man, you shure are a smart guy....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm not smart, you're just barely conscious!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: At this rate, you won't even be able to hold a sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I can sho hol' a short!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! What do you think you're doing?! Keep away from him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hyouzou's a "butchering drunk"!!!

summary: The Straw Hats Make Their Entrance. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
